query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, tipo, DATE(createdAt) as data 
FROM interacoes 
GROUP BY tipo, DATE(createdAt) 
ORDER BY data DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, tipo, DATE(createdAt) as data 
FROM interacoes 
GROUP BY tipo, DATE(createdAt) 
ORDER BY data DESC 
LIMIT 10;
